narrative:
Kettering City has 40,910 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.5% D−R vs -13.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
